tool_input.command:
python - <<'PY'
import json, os
from pathlib import Path
for p in [Path('memory/long_term'), Path('sessions')]:
    files=list(p.glob('*.json')) if p.exists() else []
    total=sum(f.stat().st_size for f in files)
    print(p, 'json_files=', len(files), 'size_kb=', round(total/1024,1))
    for f in sorted(files, key=lambda x:x.stat().st_size, reverse=True)[:10]:
        print(' ', f.name, round(f.stat().st_size/1024,1),'KB')
idx=Path('memory/long_term/index.json')
if idx.exists():
    data=json.loads(idx.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    print('index counts:', {k: len(v) if isinstance(v, dict) else 'na' for k,v in data.items() if k in ['index','item_index','inverted_index','item_inverted_index']})
PY
